reference_answer: Prop master Kira Moss held custody of the prop cage key.
DR-3 proposed giving every cast captain a weekend prop cage key.
DR-3 remained draft pending safety committee review.
The safety committee approved assistant-director access during supervised rehearsal only and rejected weekend cast-captain checkout.
RG-3 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-3 and ignored the safety committee rejection and CF-3.
